body_txt: In real life, death is forever ( possibly ). However, this simply won't do for video games. In video games, either you might get a limited number of lives or continues, or you might "respawn" after a short period of time has passed. Most early games didn't try to explain it , but this trope is about more recent ones that try and contrive a reason for it anyway, such as magic or Applied Phlebotinum , like an extremely easy version of Only Mostly Dead . See also Death Is a Slap on the Wrist and 1-Up . Compare Justified Extra Lives . Contrast Permadeath .                      Non-game examples
